free_text: Study of reactions 19F(d,p)20F and 23Na(d,p)24Na in the
The targets were prepared by vacuum evaporation of PbF2
and NaBr compounds on the carbon backings with the
thickness of 20-30 mu-g/cm2. In the energy range of
2.5-3.5 MeV "thick" targets (270 mu-g/cm2 for PbF2 and
240 mu-g/cm2 for NaBr) were used. For the energy range
of 3.5-4.0 MeV "thin" targets (50 mu-g/cm2) were used.
with the accuracy no worse than 15%.
added. EDEG in METHOD was added. In sub 002-004
COMMENT was added. STATUS in sub 005,007 was
corrected. Data format in sub 005, 007 was changed.
Error definition in sub 001, 005, 006, 007 was changed.
